title: T-002 — Reference table qa_failure_reasons (02-SETTINGS §8 extension)
prompt:
# T-002 — Reference table qa_failure_reasons

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_inspections.fail_reason_code_id, §8 SCN-072 (7 failure reasons), §16.3, ADR-034
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Register `qa_failure_reasons` reference table (industry-configurable taxonomy) with the 7 baseline scanner failure reasons matching 06-SCN §8.5 contract so SCN-072 and inspection fail flows can FK `fail_reason_code_id`.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0091_qa_failure_reasons_reftable.sql` registers reference_tables row code=`qa_failure_reasons` with schema_json {code,label,scanner_visible bool,severity_default text,category,i18n jsonb}.
2. Seed 7 scanner-visible rows: damaged_packaging, foreign_object, temperature_out_of_spec, weight_variance, missing_documentation, allergen_cross_contact, microbiological_concern. Plus 3 desktop-only rows: visual_defect_other, sensory_off_spec, label_mismatch.
3. Server helper `apps/web/src/server/quality/failureReasons.ts` exporting `getFailureReasons(orgId, {scannerVisible?})`.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0091_qa_failure_reasons_reftable.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/failureReasons.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/failureReasons.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0091 applied, when SELECT FROM reference_tables_rows WHERE table_code='qa_failure_reasons' runs, then exactly 10 rows exist (7 scanner_visible=true, 3 false)
2. Given filter scannerVisible=true, when getFailureReasons(orgId,{scannerVisible:true}) is called, then it returns exactly 7 rows in stable category ordering
3. Given a row insert with severity_default not in (critical,major,minor), then the reference_tables JSON-schema validator rejects it

pipeline_inputs.description: Register qa_failure_reasons reference table + seed 7 scanner + 3 desktop rows + server helper.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0091 inserts registry row with schema_json {code,label,scanner_visible,severity_default,category,i18n}. Seeds 10 rows (7 scanner-visible matching 06-SCN §8.5, 3 desktop-only). Helper getFailureReasons supports scannerVisible filter under tenant RLS. Tests cover count, filter, validator rejection.
out_of_scope: Do not build scanner inspect API (T-024)
Do not register hold_reasons (T-001) or waste_categories (T-003)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0091 is applied, when SELECT FROM reference_tables_rows WHERE table_code='qa_failure_reasons' runs, then exactly 10 rows exist with 7 having scanner_visible=true and 3 false
Given scannerVisible filter, when getFailureReasons(orgId,{scannerVisible:true}) is called, then exactly 7 rows are returned ordered stably by (category,label)
Given a row insert with severity_default not in {critical,major,minor}, then the reference_tables JSON-schema validator rejects it
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/failureReasons.test.ts asserting count, filter, validator rejection before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test failureReasons'
risk_red_lines: Do not hardcode failure reasons in scanner code (06-SCN §8.5 must read this reference table)
Do not omit i18n jsonb column
Do not deviate from the 7 canonical scanner reasons listed in §8 SCN-072
